name: D & H Lending
description_short: Texas-based mortgage lender offering home purchase and refinance loans with a no-pressure, technology-driven approach and competitive rates.
description_long:
D&H Lending is a mortgage lender headquartered in and operating exclusively in Texas. Founded on the principle of transparency and customer-first service, the company positions itself as an alternative to traditional high-pressure mortgage brokers, emphasizing technology, education, and competitive pricing as its core differentiators.

The company offers home purchase loans and refinance options through their proprietary digital platform called "The Loan Home®." Borrowers can obtain free rate quotes without submitting an application, access a personal pricing dashboard for 24/7 monitoring, complete applications and document uploads online, and track loan status in real-time. The company claims to consistently outperform industry averages on rates and closing costs.

D&H Lending distinguishes itself through several specific operational choices: a stated no-sales approach (rejecting high-pressure tactics), a compressed 7-day loan process timeline, Texas-only lending focus, friendly customer service, and continuous technology investment. The company emphasizes that borrowers control the pace—there is no pressure to rush decisions.

While the website projects a modern, customer-friendly image with competitive positioning, prospective borrowers should note that the company operates only in Texas, limiting accessibility for out-of-state applicants. The specific loan products available (FHA, VA, jumbo, etc.) are not detailed on the homepage, and actual rate competitiveness would require quote verification against other lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free online rate quotes and pre-qualification with no application required upfront
Personal pricing dashboard provides 24/7 access to loan details and pricing
Compressed 7-day loan timeline from qualification to closing
No-pressure sales approach allows borrowers to control pace and timeline
Texas-based team with local lending expertise and regional focus
Transparent pricing model with clear visibility into rates and closing costs
Online application and document management through The Loan Home® platform
cons: Operates exclusively in Texas, making the company inaccessible to borrowers outside the state
Website lacks detailed information about specific loan products (FHA, VA, jumbo, ARMs, etc.)
No disclosed information about minimum credit scores, down payment requirements, or debt-to-income limits
Claimed rate/cost competitiveness is not independently verified or documented on the site
Limited company background or history provided; no team credentials or licensing details visible
best_for: Texas homebuyers seeking a straightforward mortgage process without high-pressure sales tactics
Borrowers who value transparency and want access to real-time loan tracking via digital platform
Homeowners in Texas considering refinancing who prefer to control the timeline at their own pace
diagnosis: D&H Lending is best suited for Texas homebuyers and refinancers who prioritize a transparent, technology-enabled experience over traditional banking relationships and prefer to avoid high-pressure sales. The primary caveat is geographic restriction to Texas only; out-of-state applicants cannot use this lender regardless of other factors.
services: Online application through The Loan Home® platform
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
